context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the implement-background-job instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when the task is to add, configure, or review background jobs in a Rails application.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Core principle:** Design jobs for idempotency and safe retries. Prefer Active Job's unified API; choose backend based on Rails version and scale.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: EVERY job MUST have its test written and validated BEFORE implementation.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write the job spec (idempotency, retry, error handling)

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run the spec — verify it fails because the job does not exist yet

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: EVERY job that performs a side effect (charge, email, API call) MUST have

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: EVERY perform method should do only three things:

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Load the record from the passed ID
